item_name: Measure a red flashlight's 9 V battery with a digital multimeter completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note documenting measurement of a red flashlight's 9 V battery with a digital multimeter. The image shows a compact red flashlight body, a detached rectangular battery, multimeter probes, and a small measurement record with battery icons and voltage check blocks suggested through visual layout rather than text. The arrangement should make it obvious that the battery belongs to the flashlight and has been verified as part of troubleshooting or maintenance.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future household-electronics aesthetic: soft indoor workbench lighting, realistic plastic housing, metal contacts, and paper textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the flashlight, battery, and completion note centered and tidy so the image reads clearly at small size.
